criteria.reason: Fresh command output shows package installation and hybrid import check succeeded before the later FileNotFoundError.
Notebook search and inspected snippet identify default Drive root, requested path handling, input_dir creation, and missing-file check.
The log proves Colab sees an empty mounted input folder; the diagnosis explains the web UI/runtime mismatch as stale mount or different authenticated account, with path mismatch as secondary check.
Evidence contains concrete Colab remount and Path diagnostics, and no production-code change is required.

commands_run.summary: Confirmed successful hybrid import check followed by FileNotFoundError and empty visible input folder.

commands_run.command: rg -n 'DEFAULT_ROOT_DIR|DEFAULT_INPUT_PATH|def maybe_mount_drive|if force_remount|def describe_missing_input|visible_files =|similar_files =|def analyze_video|input_dir = root / "input"|requested_path = Path|not requested_path\.is_file|force_remount_drive_input' run_surface_decoder_colab.ipynb

Confirmed requirements install and import check precede input_dir creation and requested_path.is_file() failure path.

freshness_note: Verifier pass was run as a strict separate phase in the parent session. A subagent was not spawned because the active multi-agent tool requires explicit user permission for delegation.
